steps.title: Find the subject
steps.content: The subject of the sentence is the singular noun phrase Food writer J. Kenji Lopez-Alt. The phrase who explores the science behind cooking only describes him, so the verb must agree with a singular subject.

steps.title: Use singular agreement
steps.content: Choice A, Choice C, and Choice D are plural verb forms, so they do not agree with the singular subject. The singular present-tense verb correctly completes the sentence. The answer is B.
